title: Introduction to Redstone Circuits
description: Learn to create complex redstone mechanisms

content.text:
Advanced Redstone

Redstone circuits can create complex mechanisms like doors, traps, and automated farms.

Redstone Components:

  • Redstone Torch - Power source
  • Redstone Repeater - Extends signal
  • Redstone Comparator - Compares signals
  • Piston - Pushes blocks
  • Sticky Piston - Pushes and pulls blocks

Simple Circuits:

  • AND gate - Both inputs must be on
  • OR gate - Either input can be on
  • NOT gate - Inverts the signal
  • Clock - Repeating signal

Building Tips:

  • Plan your circuit before building
  • Use repeaters for long distances
  • Test each part as you build
  • Keep circuits compact

Example Projects:

  • Automatic door
  • Hidden staircase
  • Item sorter
  • Trap mechanisms
content.task: Build a simple redstone door that opens when you step on a pressure plate.
